title: Kirk Yeaman
description: Former GB & England international rugby league footballer
extract:
Kirk Yeaman (born 15 September 1983) is a former English professional rugby league footballer who played as a centre. An England and Great Britain international, he played his entire club career for Hull FC in the Super League, but also made two appearances for Doncaster as a dual-registration player.
He made 373 appearances for Hull FC between 2001 and 2016 before retiring after a 15-year career with the club, but briefly came out of retirement in May 2018 to register himself as a player due to the number of injury problems the club had.
